title: fremontia californica subsp. napensis
intro: Fremontia californica subsp. napensis, also known as Fremont's goldenbush, is a shrub that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the coastal regions of California. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Fremont's goldenbush include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
